PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

    <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6386177>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  ?countryLimerickLake
  }

SELECT DISTINCT  ?president ?company ?inspiration
WHERE
  {   { ?president <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P39>/<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279> <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q30461> .
        ?president  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?date
        FILTER ( year(?date) = 1945 )
      }
    UNION
      { ?company  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P452>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q581105> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P740>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q956>
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q5582>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P737>  ?inspiration
      }
  }

      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>

      SELECT DISTINCT  ?kerouacBook
      WHERE
        { ?kerouacBook  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P123>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q921536> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q47461344> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q160534>
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?harryPotterAuthor
      WHERE
        { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q8337>
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  ?harryPotterAuthor
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?topPoet
      WHERE
        { ?topPoet  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q49757> .

        }
      GROUP BY ?topPoet
      ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?book))
      LIMIT   1
    }
  }

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT  ?youngestMVP ?redSoxStadium ?tallPlayer
WHERE
  {   { ?youngestMVP  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q3665646> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?birthDate ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P166>  ?award .
        ?award    rdfs:label            ?awardLabel
        FILTER ( contains(lcase(?awardLabel), "mvp") || contains(lcase(?awardLabel), "most valuable player") )
        FILTER langMatches(lang(?awardLabel), "EN")
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q213959>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P115>  ?redSoxStadium
      }
    UNION
      { ?tallPlayer  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q3665646> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2048>  ?height
        FILTER ( ?height > 200 )
      }
  }
ORDER BY ASC(?birthDate)
LIMIT   4

question: Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?usStateWithMN ?companyInMunich ?germanCityOver250000
WHERE
  {   { ?usStateWithMN
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q35657> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1813>  ?abbreviation
        FILTER ( str(?abbreviation) = "MN" )
      }
    UNION
      { ?companyInMunich <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q4830453> .
        ?companyInMunich
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P159>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1726>
      }
    UNION
      { ?germanCityOver250000
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population
        FILTER ( ?population > 250000 )
      }
  }

question: How many All-NBA Team awards have Shaquille O'Neal and Kobe Bryant received in the same year?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?uri
WHERE
  { ?uri    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q3665646> ;
            <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?birthDate ;
            <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P166>  ?award .
    ?award  rdfs:label            ?awardLabel
    FILTER ( contains(lcase(str(?awardLabel)), "mvp") || contains(lcase(str(?awardLabel)), "most valuable player") )
    FILTER langMatches(lang(?awardLabel), "EN")

question: How many cities are part of the Pearl River Delta?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?capitalPopulation ?germanCity ?germanCityPopulation ?leastPopCity ?leastPop
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q408>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P36>  ?capital .
    ?capital  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?capitalPopulation .
    ?germanCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?germanCityPopulation
    FILTER ( ?germanCityPopulation > 250000 )
    ?leastPopCity
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?leastPop
  }
ORDER BY ?leastPop
LIMIT   1

question: How many occupations did Mark Twain have?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?founder ?movieCount ?profession
WHERE
  { OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1336200>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P112>  ?founder
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?movie) AS ?movieCount)
        WHERE
          { ?movie  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P57>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q315484> }
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q7934>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  ?profession
      }
  }

}

```PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
  ?monarch wdt:P31 wd:Q5;                  # ?monarch is a human

  ?spouse wdt:P27 wd:Q183.                   # spouse has country of citizenship Germany (wd:Q183)
}
```

question: In how many movies was Johnny Depp casted in?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?question ?countOrMovie
WHERE
  { VALUES ?question { "How many films did Leonardo DiCaprio star in?" "In which films directed by Garry Marshall was Julia Roberts starring?" "What movies does Jesse Eisenberg play in?" }
    BIND(if(( ?question = "How many films did Leonardo DiCaprio star in?" ), "count", "list") AS ?type)
    FILTER ( ( ( ?question = "How many films did Leonardo DiCaprio star in?" ) || ( ?question = "In which films directed by Garry Marshall was Julia Roberts starring?" ) ) || ( ?question = "What movies does Jesse Eisenberg play in?" ) )
    OPTIONAL
      { FILTER ( ?question = "How many films did Leonardo DiCaprio star in?" )
        { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
          PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
          PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
          PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
          PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
          
          SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?film) AS ?count)
          WHERE
            { ?film  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q11424> ;
                     <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P161>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q38111>
            }
        }
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { FILTER ( ?question = "In which films directed by Garry Marshall was Julia Roberts starring?" )
        { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
          PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
          PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
          PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
          PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
          
          SELECT DISTINCT  ?film
          WHERE
            { ?film  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q11424> ;
                     <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P57>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q315087> ;
                     <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P161>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q40523>
            }
        }
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { FILTER ( ?question = "What movies does Jesse Eisenberg play in?" )
        { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
          PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
          PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
          PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
          PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
          
          SELECT DISTINCT  ?film
          WHERE
            { ?film  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P161>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q219512> }
        }
      }
    BIND(if(( ?question = "How many films did Leonardo DiCaprio star in?" ), str(?count), if(( ?question = "In which films directed by Garry Marshall was Julia Roberts starring?" ), str(?film), if(( ?question = "What movies does Jesse Eisenberg play in?" ), str(?film), ""))) AS ?countOrMovie)
  }

WHERE

        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

        WHERE
          { ?movie  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q11424> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P162>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q193668> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P495>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q29> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P161>  ?actor
          }

    UNION

        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

question: Was Shaquille O'Neal the teammate of Kobe Bryant in the year of 2000?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?player
WHERE
  { ?player  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q3665646> ;
             <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?birthDate ;
             <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P166>  ?award ;
             <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2048>  ?height .
    ?award   rdfs:label            ?awardLabel
    FILTER ( contains(lcase(str(?awardLabel)), "mvp") || contains(lcase(str(?awardLabel)), "most valuable player") )
    FILTER langMatches(lang(?awardLabel), "EN")
    FILTER ( ?height > 200 )
  }
ORDER BY ?birthDate
LIMIT   4

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?populationDensityRank ?germanCity ?femaleChancellor
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(?countryHigherDensity) AS ?populationDensityRank)
        WHERE
          { ?countryHigherDensity
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population ;
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?area
            BIND(( ?population / ?area ) AS ?density)
            <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183>
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?germanPopulation ;
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?germanArea
            BIND(( ?germanPopulation / ?germanArea ) AS ?germanDensity)
            FILTER ( ?density > ?germanDensity )
          }
      }
    UNION
      { ?germanCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?pop
        FILTER ( ?pop > 250000 )
      }
    UNION
      { ?femaleChancellor
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P21>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6581072> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P39>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q4970706>
      }
  }

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?indianCompanyWithMostEmployees ?companiesOverMillionEmployees ?ibmRevenue
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?indianCompanyWithMostEmployees
      WHERE
        { ?indianCompanyWithMostEmployees
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q4830453> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q668> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1128>  ?employees
        }
      ORDER BY DESC(?employees)
      LIMIT   1
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  ?companiesOverMillionEmployees
        WHERE
          { ?type (<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q4830453> .
            ?companiesOverMillionEmployees
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  ?type ;
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1128>  ?num

      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q37156>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2139>  ?ibmRevenue
      }
  }
LIMIT   1

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?book
WHERE
  {   { ?book  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q72653> }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q658375>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  ?author .
        ?book     <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  ?author
        FILTER ( ?book != <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q658375> )
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q45875>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  ?novelist .
        ?book     <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  ?novelist
        FILTER ( ?book = <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q45875> )
      }
  }

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  {   { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q25310>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P40>  ?daughter .
        ?daughter  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P21>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6581072> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P26>  ?uri
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q43247>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P40>  ?daughter .
        ?daughter  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P21>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6581072> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P26>  ?uri
      }
    UNION
      { ?movie  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P161>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q219512>
        BIND(<http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q219512> AS ?actor)
        BIND(?movie AS ?uri)
      }
  }

SELECT  ?surinameLang ?iranBordersCount ?countryMostLang

  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q730>

    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(?borderCountry) AS ?iranBordersCount)
      WHERE
        { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q794>
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P47>  ?borderCountry

      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?countryMostLang

```PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?germanCity ?population ?numStudents ?melbournePopulation WHERE {
  # German cities with more than 250000 inhabitants
  ?germanCity wdt:P17 wd:Q183 ;       # Country: Germany
              wdt:P31 wd:Q515 ;       # Instance of: city
              wdt:P1082 ?population .
  FILTER(?population > 250000)

  # Free University of Amsterdam students count (Q214341)
  OPTIONAL { wd:Q214341 wdt:P2196 ?numStudents . }

  # Population of Melbourne, Florida (Q949779)
  OPTIONAL { wd:Q949779 wdt:P1082 ?melbournePopulation . }
}
LIMIT 100
```

question: What is the title of the 2020 released movie in which Carey Mulligan was the main actress?
sparql:
SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE {
  VALUES ?actor1 { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q40523> } # Julia Roberts
  VALUES ?actor2 { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q48410> } # Richard Gere
  VALUES ?director { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q315087> } # Garry Marshall
  VALUES ?star { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q37876> } # Natalie Portman
  
  { 
    # Films directed by Garry Marshall starring Julia Roberts
    ?uri wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 .
    ?uri wdt:P57 ?director .
    ?uri wdt:P161 ?actor1 .
  }
  UNION
  {
    # Films with Julia Roberts and Richard Gere
    ?uri wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 .
    ?uri wdt:P161 ?actor1 .
    ?uri wdt:P161 ?actor2 .
  }
  UNION
  {
    # Producers of films starring Natalie Portman
    ?uri wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 .
    ?uri wdt:P161 ?star .
    ?uri wdt:P162 ?producer .
    BIND(?producer AS ?uri)
  }
}

question: Is Germany bigger than Poland?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?polandPopulation ?smallestCity ?smallestCityArea ?germanyDensityRank
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q36>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?polandPopulation
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?smallestCity ?smallestCityArea
      WHERE
        { ?smallestCity <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> .
          ?smallestCity
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?smallestCityArea
        }
      ORDER BY ?smallestCityArea
      LIMIT   1
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (( COUNT(?country) + 1 ) AS ?germanyDensityRank)
      WHERE
        { ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?pop ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?area
          BIND(( ?pop / ?area ) AS ?density)
          <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183>
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?gPop ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?gArea
          BIND(( ?gPop / ?gArea ) AS ?gDensity)
          FILTER ( ?density > ?gDensity )
        }
    }
  }

```PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?inspiredBy ?artisticMovement ?museum WHERE {
  # Who was Vincent van Gogh inspired by?
  wd:Q5582 wdt:P737 ?inspiredBy .

  # To which artistic movement did the painter of The Three Dancers belong?
  wd:Q3235867 wdt:P170 ?painter .
  ?painter wdt:P135 ?artisticMovement .

  # Which museum exhibits The Scream by Munch?
  wd:Q471379 wdt:P527/wdt:P276 ?museum .
  ?museum wdt:P31 wd:Q207694 .
}
```

    OPTIONAL

      }
  }

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?jackWolfskinFoundingDate ?surfer ?organization ?orgFoundingDate
WHERE
  { OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q536133>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P571>  ?jackWolfskinFoundingDate
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?surfer   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q13561328> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P19>  ?birthplace .
        ?birthplace  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q408>
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?organization <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q43229> .
        ?organization
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P571>  ?orgFoundingDate
        FILTER ( year(?orgFoundingDate) = 1930 )
      }
  }

sparql:

PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?episode
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q5274359>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P3457>  ?seriesSeason .
    ?episode  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P4908>  ?seriesSeason .
    ?seriesSeason
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q21191270> ;

              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P453>  ?seasonNumber
    FILTER ( ?seasonNumber = "1" )
  }

```PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?episode WHERE {
  # The Sopranos TV series
  wd:Q5274359 wdt:P3457 ?seriesSeason .

  ?seriesSeason wdt:P31 wd:Q21191270 .      # instance of TV season

  ?seriesSeason wdt:P453 ?seasonNumber .
  FILTER(?seasonNumber = "1"^^xsd:string)   # first season
}
```

    OPTIONAL
      { ?jesseEisenbergMovie
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P161>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q219512>
      }
  }

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?conflict ?city ?battle
WHERE
  {   { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q170596>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P607>  ?conflict
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q214622>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P20>  ?city
      }
    UNION
      { ?battle  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P276>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q975> ;
                 <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q178561> ;
                 <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P585>  ?date
        FILTER ( year(?date) = 1836 )
      }
  }

```PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
  wd:Q567 wdt:P69 ?almaMater .
}
```

question: Where are both The Call of the Wild and White Fang set, the most two famous works of Jack London?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?novelist ?museum (COUNT(?bondMovie) AS ?bondMoviesCount)
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q45875>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  ?novelist .
    <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q471379> <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P527>/<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P276> ?museum .
    ?museum   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q207694> .
    ?bondMovie  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q11424>
    FILTER EXISTS { ?bondMovie  ?p  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q2009573>
                    FILTER ( ( ?p = <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P144> ) || ( ?p = <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P674> ) )
                  }
  }
GROUP BY ?novelist ?museum
LIMIT   1

question: Which American presidents followed in their father‘s step and also became the president?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?president_born_1945 ?wife_of_lincoln
WHERE
  {   { ?president_born_1945 <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P39>/<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279> <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q11696> .
        ?president_born_1945
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?birthdate
        FILTER ( year(?birthdate) = 1945 )
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q91>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P26>  ?wife_of_lincoln
      }
  }

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?criticallyEndangeredAnimal ?elephantSpecies ?mostFrequentCauseOfDeath
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?criticallyEndangeredAnimal
      WHERE
        { ?criticallyEndangeredAnimal
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P141>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q219127>
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?elephantSpecies
      WHERE
        { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q7378>
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>  ?elephantSpecies
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?mostFrequentCauseOfDeath
      WHERE
        { ?s  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P509>  ?mostFrequentCauseOfDeath }
      GROUP BY ?mostFrequentCauseOfDeath
      ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(DISTINCT ?s))
      LIMIT   1
    }
  }

question: Did Germany have a population growth of at least 1% since 2010?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?germanDensityRank ?germanCityOver250k ?smallestCityByArea
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(?country) AS ?germanDensityRank)
      WHERE
        { ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?area
          FILTER ( ?area > 0 )
          BIND(( ?population / ?area ) AS ?density)
          <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183>
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?germanPopulation ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?germanArea
          BIND(( ?germanPopulation / ?germanArea ) AS ?germanDensity)
          FILTER ( ?density > ?germanDensity )
        }
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ?city ; separator=', ') AS ?germanCityOver250k)
        WHERE
          { ?city  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> .
            ?city <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> .
            ?city  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population
            FILTER ( ?population > 250000 )
          }
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  ?smallestCityByArea
        WHERE
          { ?smallestCityByArea
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> .
            ?smallestCityByArea <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> .
            ?smallestCityByArea
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?area
          }
        ORDER BY ?area
        LIMIT   1
      }
  }

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?author ?date_of_death ?cause_of_death
WHERE
  { OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q23572>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P86>  ?author
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q2831>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P570>  ?date_of_death
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q4977246>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P509>  ?cause_of_death
      }
  }

question: What is the offical language of Taipei?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?officialLanguagePhilippines ?countryMostLanguages ?countrySpeakingJapanese
WHERE
  { { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q928>
                <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  ?officialLanguagePhilippines
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?countryMostLanguages (COUNT(?language) AS ?languageCount)
      WHERE
        { ?countryMostLanguages
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  ?language
        }
      GROUP BY ?countryMostLanguages
      ORDER BY DESC(?languageCount)
      LIMIT   1
    }
    { ?countrySpeakingJapanese
                <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q5287>
    }
  }

    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

question: Which universities have more than 200000 students?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?question ?answer
WHERE
  {   { BIND("How many students does the Free University of Amsterdam have?" AS ?question)
        <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q214341>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2196>  ?answer
      }
    UNION
      { BIND("Which German cities have more than 250000 inhabitants?" AS ?question)
        ?city  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> ;
               <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> ;
               <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?pop
        FILTER ( ?pop > 250000 )
        BIND(?city AS ?answer)
      }
    UNION
      { BIND("How many scientists graduated from an Ivy League university?" AS ?question)
        { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
          PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
          PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
          PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
          PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
          
          SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?scientist) AS ?answer)
          WHERE
            { ?scientist  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q901> ;
                        <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P69>  ?university .
              <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q49113>
                        <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P527>  ?university
            }
        }
      }
  }
ORDER BY ?question

question: Who wrote "Prototypical Networks for Few-shot Learning"?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?books
WHERE
  {   { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q658375>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  ?author .
        ?books    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  ?author
        FILTER ( ?books != <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q658375> )
      }
    UNION
      { ?books  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q72653> ;
                <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q571>
      }
    UNION
      { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
          PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
          PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
          PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
          PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
          
          SELECT  ?poet (COUNT(?book) AS ?count)
          WHERE
            { ?poet  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q49757> .
              ?book  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  ?poet ;
                     <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q571>
            }
          GROUP BY ?poet
          ORDER BY DESC(?count)
          LIMIT   1
        }
        ?books  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  ?poet ;
                <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q571>
      }
  }

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?soccerClub ?playerBornInMalta ?youngestPlayer
WHERE
  { ?soccerClub  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q476028> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P118>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q9448>
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?playerBornInMalta
      WHERE
        { ?playerBornInMalta
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q937857> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P19>  ?birthPlace .
          ?birthPlace  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q233>
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?youngestPlayer
      WHERE
        { ?team     <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P118>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q9448> .
          ?youngestPlayer
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P54>  ?team ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?dateOfBirth
        }
      ORDER BY DESC(?dateOfBirth)
      LIMIT   1
    }
  }

                                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2044>  ?otherHeight

    <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1009>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P36>  ?capital .
    ?largestCountry
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?area
    FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?otherCountry
                                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?otherArea
                        FILTER ( ?otherArea > ?area )
                      }
  }
LIMIT   1

question: which city is more populated, copenhagen or amsterdam?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?germanCity ?amsterdamStudents ?smallestGermanCity
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?germanCity
      WHERE
        { ?germanCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> .
          ?germanCity <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> .
          ?germanCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population
          FILTER ( ?population > 250000 )
        }
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q214341>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2196>  ?amsterdamStudents
      }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?smallestGermanCity
      WHERE
        { ?smallestGermanCity
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> .
          ?smallestGermanCity <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> .
          ?smallestGermanCity
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?area
        }
      ORDER BY ?area
      LIMIT   1
    }
  }

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?answer
WHERE
  {   { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q85>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?answer
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q5806> (<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P131>)+ ?country .
        ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256>
        BIND(?country AS ?answer)
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q12495>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1101>  ?bkFloors .
        ?building  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1101>  ?floors
        FILTER ( ?floors > ?bkFloors )
        { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
          PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
          PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
          PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
          PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
          
          SELECT  ?building (MAX(?floors) AS ?maxFloors)
          WHERE
            { ?building  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1101>  ?floors
              FILTER ( ?floors > ?bkFloors )
            }
          GROUP BY ?building
        }
        BIND(?building AS ?answer)
      }
  }
LIMIT   3
